attach-zugferd-xml-to-pdf.title: Attach ZUGFeRD XML to PDF and Convert to PDF/A‑3B
attach-zugferd-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, embed a ZUGFeRD XML file as an attached file, optionally convert the document to PDF/A‑3B for compliance, and save the resulting PDF.

create-zugferd-compliant-invoice-pdf.title: Create ZUGFeRD‑Compliant Invoice PDF
create-zugferd-compliant-invoice-pdf.description: Shows how to load a readable PDF invoice template, embed ZUGFeRD XML data, convert the document to PDF/A‑3 ZUGFeRD format, and save the compliant PDF.

validate-zugferd-pdf.title: Validate ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf
validate-zugferd-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF that contains ZUGFeRD data and validate it against the ZUGFeRD specification, writing a validation report to a log file.

extract-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.title: Extract ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the embedded ZUGFeRD XML attachment, and save it as a local file.

update-zugferd-xml-attachment.title: Update ZUGFeRD XML Attachment in PDF
update-zugferd-xml-attachment.description: Shows how to replace an existing ZUGFeRD XML file or add a new one as an embedded attachment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-zugferd-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove ZUGFeRD Attachment from PDF
remove-zugferd-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, find embedded files whose name contains "ZUGFeRD", delete those attachments, and save the resulting document.

add-custom-metadata-to-zugferd-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata to ZUGFeRD PDF
add-custom-metadata-to-zugferd-pdf.description: Shows how to load a ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add custom metadata entries such as project code and department, and save the updated document.

encrypt-zugferd-pdf-with-passwords.title: Encrypt ZUGFeRD PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-zugferd-pdf-with-passwords.description: Demonstrates loading a ZUGFeRD PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, then saving the encrypted file.

digitally-sign-zugferd-pdf-with-timestam.title: Digitally Sign ZUGFeRD PDF with Timestamp
digitally-sign-zugferd-pdf-with-timestam.description: Demonstrates loading a ZUGFeRD PDF, adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature from a PFX file, and attaching a timestamp from a TSA service, then saving the signed document.

add-expiry-date-javascript-action-to-pdf.title: Add Expiry Date JavaScript Action to PDF
add-expiry-date-javascript-action-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a document‑level JavaScript open action that checks the current date against a specified expiry date and closes the PDF if it has expired.

set-javascript-open-action-page-10.title: Set JavaScript Open Action to Navigate to Page 10
set-javascript-open-action-page-10.description: Demonstrates how to add a JavaScript open action to a PDF that automatically jumps to page 10 when the document is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-level-javascript-alert.title: Add Page-Level JavaScript Alert to PDF
add-page-level-javascript-alert.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action on a specific PDF page that displays an alert when the page becomes visible, using Aspose.Pdf.

calculate-order-total-pdf-form.title: Calculate Order Total in PDF Form
calculate-order-total-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to read quantity and price fields from a PDF form, compute the total amount, and write the result back into a form field using Aspose.Pdf.

add-auto-save-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Save JavaScript to PDF
add-auto-save-javascript-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates embedding a document‑level JavaScript action that automatically saves the PDF at defined intervals using Aspose.Pdf.

draw-star-shape-with-pdf-operators.title: Draw a Star Shape with Low-Level PDF Operators
draw-star-shape-with-pdf-operators.description: Demonstrates how to insert low-level PDF drawing operators to render a custom 5-pointed star at specified coordinates on an existing PDF document.

change-pdf-line-width.title: Change PDF Line Width from 1 to 3 Points
change-pdf-line-width.description: Shows how to iterate PDF page operators and modify SetLineWidth operators to change line width from 1 point to 3 points using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-background-graphics-operators.title: Remove Background Graphics Operators from PDF
remove-background-graphics-operators.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, identify fill and stroke operators that create background graphics, and delete them from the content stream using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-using-showtext-operators.title: Replace Text in PDF Using ShowText Operators
replace-text-using-showtext-operators.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate low‑level ShowText (Tj) operators, replace a specific string, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-bar-chart-pdf-custom-colors.title: Create Bar Chart PDF with Custom Colors and Axis Labels
create-bar-chart-pdf-custom-colors.description: The example generates a PDF containing a bar chart using Aspose.Pdf's Graph API, drawing axes, bars with custom colors, and adding category labels on the X‑axis.

line-graph-multiple-stroke-styles.title: Create Line Graph with Multiple Stroke Styles
line-graph-multiple-stroke-styles.description: Shows how to generate a PDF line graph with three data series, each using a different stroke style (solid, dashed, dotted) using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-vector-graphic-in-pdf.title: Embed Vector Graphic in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
embed-vector-graphic-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph container, adding rectangle, ellipse, and line vector shapes, and embedding the vector graphic directly into a PDF page with cross‑platform save handling.

combine-multiple-graphs-2x2-grid.title: Combine Multiple Graphs on a Single PDF Page (2x2 Grid)
combine-multiple-graphs-2x2-grid.description: Creates a PDF with four Aspose.Pdf Graph objects arranged in a two‑by‑two grid on one page, showing how to position graphs, add shapes, titles, and handle platform‑specific saving.

generate-invoices-with-sales-graph.title: Generate Invoices with Sales Graphs
generate-invoices-with-sales-graph.description: Shows how to batch create PDF invoices from a template, add customer and amount text, and embed a simple sales chart using Aspose.Pdf's Graph API.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to a PDF document as a file‑attachment annotation, including a description and MIME type settings.

attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.title: Attach Multiple Files with Descriptions to a PDF
attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add several file attachment annotations to a PDF, each with its own MIME type, description and icon using Aspose.Pdf.

list-pdf-attachments-sizes.title: List PDF Attachments and Their Sizes
list-pdf-attachments-sizes.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, detect embedded files, and print each attachment's name and byte size.

remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Attachment from PDF
remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a named embedded file from a PDF while keeping other attachments using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-attachment-description.title: Update PDF Attachment Description
update-pdf-attachment-description.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate file attachment annotations, modify the attached file's description, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-metadata-invoice-number.title: Set PDF Title, Author, and Custom Invoice Number
set-pdf-metadata-invoice-number.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assign standard metadata (Title and Author), add a custom metadata entry for the invoice number, ensure the document has a page, and save it.

read-custom-pdf-metadata-log.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata and Log for Auditing
read-custom-pdf-metadata-log.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracts user‑defined metadata entries from the DocumentInfo dictionary, and writes them to a text file for audit purposes.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-with-passwords.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Passwords
encrypt-pdf-aes256-with-passwords.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with separate user and owner passwords, setting basic permissions, and saving the protected document.

set-pdf-permissions-allow-printing.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Printing Only
set-pdf-permissions-allow-printing.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, granting only printing permission while restricting content extraction and annotation modifications.

digitally-sign-pdf-with-pfx-timestamp.title: Digitally Sign PDF with PFX Certificate and Timestamp
digitally-sign-pdf-with-pfx-timestamp.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature from a PFX file, adding an RFC‑3161 timestamp, and saving the signed document.

verify-pdf-digital-signature.title: Verify PDF Digital Signature and Retrieve Signer Details
verify-pdf-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF, check for compromised signatures, verify the digital signature, and extract signer information such as authority, date, reason, and location using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configure DocSaveOptions to keep the original layout, fonts, and tables, and save the document as a DOCX file.

convert-pdf-to-html-embedded-base64-imag.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Base64 Images
convert-pdf-to-html-embedded-base64-imag.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a single HTML file using Aspose.Pdf while embedding all resources and raster images as Base64‑encoded PNGs inside SVG wrappers.

convert-pdf-page-to-high-resolution-png.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG
convert-pdf-page-to-high-resolution-png.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting a 300 DPI resolution, and converting the first page to a PNG image.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images
batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all PDF files in a folder, convert each page to a high‑resolution JPEG, and save the images with names derived from the original PDF file.

export-selected-pdf-pages.title: Export Selected PDF Pages to Separate Files
export-selected-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF and save each page as an individual PDF file while preserving the original page size and orientation using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-multiple-pdfs-preserving-bookmarks.title: Merge Multiple PDFs Preserving Bookmarks
merge-multiple-pdfs-preserving-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to combine several PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf while retaining the original bookmarks and outline hierarchy.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Separate Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-individual-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page as an individual PDF file.

extract-text-pdf-line-breaks.title: Extract Text from PDF with Line Breaks Preserved
extract-text-pdf-line-breaks.description: Demonstrates extracting all textual content from a PDF while retaining line breaks and spacing using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber and TextExtractionOptions.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF Preserving Original Format
extract-images-from-pdf.description: The example opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page, extracts embedded images, detects their format, and saves them with the original resolution and file extension.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export its interactive form fields to a JSON file, and optionally display the generated JSON.

populate-pdf-form-from-json-and-flatten.title: Populate PDF Form from JSON and Flatten
populate-pdf-form-from-json-and-flatten.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing form field values from a JSON file, flattening the form to make fields read‑only, and saving the resulting PDF.

print-pdf-silently-to-default-printer.title: Print PDF Silently to Default Printer
print-pdf-silently-to-default-printer.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer to send a PDF file directly to the default printer without showing any print dialog.

print-pdf-page-range-to-network-printer.title: Print PDF Page Range to Network Printer with Duplex and Custom Paper Size
print-pdf-page-range-to-network-printer.description: Demonstrates how to send a specific range of PDF pages to a network printer, configuring duplex mode, custom paper dimensions, and printer settings using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-open-action-jump-to-page-.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Jump to Page 5
add-javascript-open-action-jump-to-page-.description: Demonstrates how to set a JavaScript open action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so the document automatically navigates to page five when opened.

auto-print-pdf-on-open.title: Auto‑Print PDF on Open with JavaScript Action
auto-print-pdf-on-open.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript action in a PDF that automatically opens the print dialog when the document is loaded, using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-author-metadata.title: Set PDF Author Metadata Dynamically
set-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the current system user and assign it to the Author property of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated document.

toggle-form-field-visibility-with-javasc.title: Toggle Form Field Visibility with JavaScript in PDF
toggle-form-field-visibility-with-javasc.description: Demonstrates adding a checkbox and a text field to a PDF and using a JavaScript action to hide or show the text field based on the checkbox state.

add-qr-code-barcode-with-low-level-opera.title: Add QR Code Barcode Using Low-Level Operators
add-qr-code-barcode-with-low-level-opera.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a QR code barcode field at defined coordinates, inserts it into the form, and demonstrates low‑level graphics‑state operators (GSave/GRestore) before saving the document.

compress-pdf-images-optimization.title: Compress PDF Images and Optimize Resources
compress-pdf-images-optimization.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's OptimizationOptions and ImageCompressionOptions to compress and resize images, remove unused objects, and apply other optimizations to reduce PDF file size while maintaining visual quality.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-2b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-2b Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-2b.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑2b archival format using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the compliant document.

add-xmp-metadata-pdfa.title: Add XMP Metadata for PDF/A Compliance
add-xmp-metadata-pdfa.description: Shows how to embed required XMP metadata (creation date, creator tool, producer, document ID) into a PDF and convert it to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf.

add-zugferd-attachment-validate-pdfa3.title: Add ZUGFeRD attachment and validate PDF/A‑3A compliance
add-zugferd-attachment-validate-pdfa3.description: Loads an existing PDF/A‑3 document, embeds a ZUGFeRD XML invoice as an attachment, saves the updated PDF, and runs a PDF/A‑3A compliance check, writing a validation report.

convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.title: Convert PDF with ZUGFeRD attachment to PDF/A‑3U
convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF that contains a ZUGFeRD XML attachment, converting it to PDF/A‑3U format while preserving the embedded data, and saving the result.

extract-validate-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.title: Extract and Validate ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-validate-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate an embedded ZUGFeRD XML file inside a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract its content, and validate it against the official ZUGFeRD XSD schema.

batch-generate-zugferd-pdfs-from-csv.title: Batch Generate ZUGFeRD‑Compliant PDFs from CSV
batch-generate-zugferd-pdfs-from-csv.description: Shows how to read invoice data from a CSV file, embed the matching ZUGFeRD XML as an attachment, convert the document to PDF/A‑3U, and save the resulting PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-custom-ttf-font-in-pdf-graph.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font in PDF with Graph
embed-custom-ttf-font-in-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font, embedding it in a PDF, drawing a simple graph shape, and adding a text label that uses the embedded font.

subset-custom-font-low-level-operators.title: Subset Custom Font and Use Low‑Level PDF Operators
subset-custom-font-low-level-operators.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font, embedding and subsetting it to keep only used glyphs, adding text with the custom font, and inserting low‑level graphics state operators (q/Q) into a PDF.

hide-toolbar-menu-bar-pdf.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar in PDF via JavaScript
hide-toolbar-menu-bar-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to set PDF viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar by assigning a JavaScript open action and using the corresponding document properties.

add-javascript-total-calculation-to-pdf-.title: Add JavaScript Total Calculation to PDF Form
add-javascript-total-calculation-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf to sum line‑item values and display the total.

add-semi-transparent-watermark-behind-pd.title: Add Semi-Transparent Watermark Behind PDF Content
add-semi-transparent-watermark-behind-pd.description: Demonstrates how to place a low‑level WatermarkArtifact behind existing page content on every page of a PDF and make it semi‑transparent using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-form-fill-only.title: Encrypt PDF with Form‑Fill Only Permissions
encrypt-pdf-form-fill-only.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply security that permits only form filling while blocking editing, printing, and content extraction, and save the encrypted file.

remove-javascript-from-pdf.title: Remove JavaScript and Embedded Files from PDF
remove-javascript-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete document‑level, page‑level, and annotation JavaScript actions and file attachment annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

list-pdf-javascript-actions.title: List Document and Page JavaScript Actions in PDF
list-pdf-javascript-actions.description: Shows how to enumerate both document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions (OnOpen/OnClose) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to load a PDF document and convert each page into a multi‑page TIFF file with custom resolution and TIFF settings.

generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages
generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.description: Creates 150x150 PNG preview images for each page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's ThumbnailDevice.

batch-pdf-text-extraction-search-index.title: Batch PDF Text Extraction and Searchable Index
batch-pdf-text-extraction-search-index.description: Extracts text from all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf and stores the content in an in‑memory dictionary for quick case‑insensitive search.

embed-audio-with-javascript-playback.title: Embed Audio with JavaScript Playback in PDF
embed-audio-with-javascript-playback.description: Shows how to embed an MP3 as a sound annotation in a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that plays the audio automatically when the page opens using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-embedded-attachment.title: Encrypt PDF with Embedded Attachment
encrypt-pdf-with-embedded-attachment.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF and encrypt the whole document (including the attachment) with AES‑256 using user and owner passwords.

set-pdf-creation-modification-dates.title: Set PDF Creation and Modification Dates
set-pdf-creation-modification-dates.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assigning the current timestamp to its creation and modification metadata, and saving the updated document.

draw-pie-chart-with-low-level-operators.title: Draw Pie Chart with Low-Level PDF Operators
draw-pie-chart-with-low-level-operators.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf low‑level drawing operators to create a colored pie chart that visualizes sales distribution.

render-pdf-page-to-png-high-quality-anti.title: Render PDF Page to PNG with High‑Quality Anti‑Aliasing
render-pdf-page-to-png-high-quality-anti.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, configure RenderingOptions for high‑quality interpolation, and export a page as a PNG image with smoother lines and curves using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-password-prompt-and-encry.title: Add JavaScript Password Prompt and Encryption to PDF
add-javascript-password-prompt-and-encry.description: Shows how to embed JavaScript that asks for a password when the PDF is opened and then encrypt the document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-signature-field-js-validation.title: Create PDF with Signature Field and JavaScript Validation
create-pdf-signature-field-js-validation.description: Shows how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that validates the signature when the field is signed using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and export all its annotations to an XFDF file for external processing or archiving.

import-fdf-data-into-pdf-and-flatten-for.title: Import FDF Data into PDF and Flatten Form
import-fdf-data-into-pdf-and-flatten-for.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing field values from an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf's FdfReader, flattening the form, and saving the resulting PDF.

set-pdf-document-language.title: Set PDF Document Language for Accessibility
set-pdf-document-language.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting the primary language (e.g., en-US) via tagged content to improve screen‑reader accessibility, and saving the updated document.

create-pdf-toc-with-clickable-outlines.title: Create PDF Table of Contents with Clickable Outlines
create-pdf-toc-with-clickable-outlines.description: The example loads an existing PDF, enables auto‑tagging, creates a TOC element, inserts a dedicated TOC page, and configures it to show page numbers and copy entries to the document outlines (bookmarks).

batch-password-protection.title: Batch Apply Password Protection to PDFs
batch-password-protection.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder with the same user and owner passwords, applying specific permissions and handling errors.

add-auto-close-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Close JavaScript to PDF
add-auto-close-javascript-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates embedding JavaScript in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to automatically close the document after a specified timeout.
